zh.lifeSummary: Suthen於1009年出生在英國諾圖恩布利亞。她和Duncan I King of Scotland至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1070年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年61歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Suthen于1009年出生在英国諾圖恩布利亞。她和Duncan I King of Scotland至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1070年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安享年61岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Suthen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sutphin  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Sutphin
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Van Zutphen: habitational name for someone from Zutphen in the province of Gelderland. Compare Sutfin and Sutphen .

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: Suthen was born in 1009, in Northumbria, England. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Duncan I King of Scotland. She died in 1070, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Suthen est née en 1009, à Northumbria, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Duncan I King of Scotland. Elle est décédée en 1070, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Suthen wurde 1009 in Northumbria, England geboren. Sie hatte mit Duncan I King of Scotland mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1070 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Suthen è nata il nel 1009 nel Northumbria, England. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Duncan I King of Scotland. Morì nel 1070, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Suthenは1009年にイギリスノースウンブリアで生まれた。彼女はDuncan I King of Scotlandとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1070年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンで61歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Suthen(은)는 1009년 영국 노르스브리아에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Duncan I King of Scotland(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1070년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Suthen nasceu em 1009, em Northumbria, Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Duncan I King of Scotland. Ela faleceu em 1070, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Suthen родилась в 1009 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Duncan I King of Scotland. Она умерла в 1070 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Suthen nació en 1009, en Northumbria, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Duncan I King of Scotland. Murió en 1070, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido.
